subtitulo: Pick the best days and times. We'll match them with the team's calendar.

bot.saudacaoInicial: Hi! 👋 I'm the scheduling assistant. Before we start, tell me your name and email so I can find your application.
bot.encontrado: All set, {{nome}}! I found your application for {{vaga}}.
bot.perguntaDias: Which days work best for you? You can pick more than one.
bot.perguntaPeriodos: And which times of day are you available on those days?
bot.cruzando: Great! Matching your availability with {{pessoas}}'s calendar…
bot.ofereceHorarios: These are the times HR can meet with you. Tap the one you prefer:
bot.semHorarios: I couldn't find common times on those days. How about choosing other days or periods?
bot.confirmado: All set! Your {{vaga}} interview is booked for {{quando}}. You'll get the details by email. 🎉

sucesso.nota: We saved the days and times you shared. If anything changes, our team can reschedule while respecting your availability.
